title: change Automation ownership at board level
excerpt:
Current feature: If any employee leaves the organization then in admin section we can change automation ownership at account level. 
Feature request: Scenario like person changing the department and no longer has access …

posts.author: ShwetaShah (Shweta Shah)
posts.cookedHtml:
Current feature: If any employee leaves the organization then in admin section we can change automation ownership at account level.

Feature request: Scenario like person changing the department and no longer has access to the board makes it difficult if that person owns any automation. Changing automation ownership at account level is not meaningful as that person still owns automation on other boards and we want them to be automation owner for other boards.

posts.author: Gzee (Greg Zarick)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, this would be helpful. As you said, If I change departments and must leave boards that I developed automations for - they no longer work on that board. They need to be re-created by authorized people that belongs on that board.
